subcodes.first_line: O ye dwellers of the Kingdom! Thank ye God that ye have turned your faces toward the Kingdom of Abha, and are yearning
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل ملکوت شکر کنید خدا را که توجه بملکوت ابهی دارید و آرزوی استفاضه از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God
